title: Module 1
content:
INTRODUCTION TO MANAGEMENT
Concept and Foundations of Management- Functions of Management;
Planning, Organizing, Controlling, Directing- Evolution of Management
Thoughts-Classical, Neo-Classical & Modern Management Era-Approaches
to Management- Human Relations Approach, Behavioural Sciences
Approach & Systems Approach-Types of Organizational structures;
Hierarchical, Flat & Hybrid structures.

title: Module 2
content:
ORGANIZATIONAL BEHAVIOR
Importance and Nature of OB, Types of Personality, Determinants of
Personality-Perception and Factors influencing Perception-Learning; Types
and Principles of Learning, Theories of Learning-Reinforcement and types-
Group dynamics; Process of Group Formation-Stress management; Types
of Stress and consequences of stress
